a.content: Petra booked the venue for the Q3 workshop in Ljubljana.
a.source: Petra confirmed she booked the venue for the Q3 workshop in Ljubljana.

b.content: Petra booked the catering for the Q3 workshop in Ljubljana.
b.source: Catering for the Q3 Ljubljana workshop is booked — Petra handled it.

notes: FALSE-MERGE TRAP (weight 2): identical actor, event, city, kind — venue and catering are two bookings. One word carries the distinction.
